title: Synchrony (SYF) Up 16% in 6 Months: More Room to Run?
text: Synchrony (SYF) is well-poised to gain on several growth initiatives, a strong CareCredit platform and prudent capital deployment efforts.

title: A New Study by Pets Best Demonstrates How Life with Pets has Changed Since the Pandemic
text: The Pets Best Pet Parenthood Today study highlights the emotional benefits, financial considerations, and generational attitudes felt by today's pet parents STAMFORD, Conn. , Dec. 20, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Pets Best Insurance Services, LLC, a Synchrony (NYSE: SYF) health and wellness solution and leading U.S. pet health insurance provider, unveiled the results of a new study: "Pet Parenthood Today.

title: Synchrony Announces Planned Transition of Board Leadership
text: STAMFORD, Conn. , Dec. 15, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Synchrony (NYSE: SYF) today announced Margaret Keane, Executive Chair of the Board of Directors of Synchrony has announced her intention to retire effective April 3, 2023.
